input:
"#CONTEXT#
You are a B2B sales strategist writing a GTM intelligence memo for a sales team. You will receive information about:
1. A client company whose product is being sold
2. A lead who previously worked at a company that is a known customer of the client
3. The lead's current company where they now hold a relevant role

The lead's past company is a known customer of the client. The lead held a relevant role there and would have been exposed to or aware of the client's product. They have since moved to a new company in a similar or more senior role."

"#INPUTS#
client_company_name: Nostra
client_company_domain: nostra.ai
client_company_description: Nostra helps the world’s leading ecommerce brands future-proof their digital infrastructure with cutting-edge edge technology. We enable high-growth DTC companies to deploy enterprise-grade infrastructure in minutes, not months. Our edge platform is designed to accelerate site speed, increase conversion rates, and drive more revenue, while protecting your brand from modern threats. With products like Edge Delivery Engine, Edge Protection, Edge ID, and Edge Crawler, we give brands the tools to: • Boost performance by 20–30% • Block ad bot traffic before it hits your site • Extend cookie life for better attribution • Optimize content for LLM indexing and AI-native search Brands like Jolie, Amiri, and Olukai rely on Nostra to deliver faster, safer, smarter ecommerce experiences

lead_full_name: Michael C.
lead_linkedin_url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mc8218
lead_current_job_title: CEO
lead_current_company_name: Startee Apparel
lead_current_company_domain: startee.com
lead_current_company_description: At Star Tee we provide fashion tees that unite quality, comfort, flawless fit and value. We understand that today’s fashion must not only look good, but feel good. Therefore, we source the highest quality yarns available as well as utilize state of the art knitting and sewing techniques in order to provide you with true high-end retail quality and set the standard in fashion blank apparel. 

Quality and consistency are the benchmarks we strive for. Our softer, finer and smoother fabrics produce the best print results possible. Whether applying traditional screenprinting, heat transfer or direct to garment technology, our products perform at the highest level of quality.

At Star Tee we are determined to break free from basic. We strive to provide you with a fashion tee that delivers both flawless fit and ideal comfort. All of our styles are side seamed and manufactured to result in a superior product you will love to wear any day of the year.

We are excited to offer our new CVC and Tri-blend fabrics in a number of styles for both men and women. These fabrics will provide a whole new palette of colors to choose at valued price points.

Star Tee is concerned with the world we live in and takes environmental responsibility seriously. We strive to make all of our manufacturing facilities eco-conscious by reducing waste, recycling and promoting a clean environment. Our factories are W.R.A.P. certified and implement clean, safe, well lit, and modern working environments for all of our associates.

Thank you for your support and we look forward to working with you this year and many more!

lead_past_company_name: Forever 21
lead_past_company_domain: forever21.com
lead_past_company_description: Forever 21 continues to be a fashion industry leader with a mission to make the latest trends accessible to all. F21 persists on staying ahead of innovation and providing styles and fit that our customers love. While reinventing for now and beyond, we’re seeking passionate and creative new family members to join us on this adventure! F21 continues to operate E-commerce and 450 locations across the U.S. along with maintaining a strong brand DNA with consumers and within the fashion industry. 

In February 2020, Forever 21 came under new ownership made up of Simon Property Group, Brookfield Property Partners, and Authentic Brands Group. Under this new ownership F21 has the financial strength and long term view that will prepare us for the future, while continuing to set the same high standards as it always has. Join our team and learn the inner sanctum of the global fashion industry, while we build the new Forever 21! 

Forever 21 is operated by SPARC Group LLC.
 
About SPARC Group LLC
SPARC Group LLC offers operational and strategic expertise including retail and e-commerce management, sourcing, design and technology for leading global brands. SPARC Group is a joint venture between Simon Property Group, a preeminent retail real estate company and Authentic Brands Group, a global leader in brand development. In addition to Forever 21, SPARC Group brands include Aéropostale, Brooks Brothers, Nautica, Eddie Bauer, and Lucky Brand.
 
SPARC Group LLC is an equal opportunity employer, and is committed to maintaining a workplace free from prohibited employment conduct, including discrimination or harassment on the basis of race, color, national origin, sex, age, religion, disability, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, domestic partner status, civil partnership, status as a covered veteran, status in the Uniformed Services of the United States, citizenship and any other characteristic protected by law.
lead_past_company_job_title: Global Expansion"

"#OBJECTIVE#
Generate a 5-section GTM strategy memo that helps a sales rep understand why this lead is a high-value target right now and exactly how to approach them.

#RESEARCH DIRECTIVES#
Before writing the memo, research the following:

1. **Current company business context** — What is the current company's scale, market position, ecommerce footprint, and growth trajectory? What operational or technical challenges would a company like this face? What about their stage creates urgency for the client's product?

2. **Competitive landscape** — Who are the current company's direct competitors? What market pressure do they face? How does site performance, conversion optimization, or digital infrastructure factor into their competitive position?

3. **Lead's role and authority** — Based on their title and the company context, what does this person own? What decisions do they influence or control? Why are they the right person to talk to about the client's product?

4. **The alumni signal** — The lead previously held a relevant role at a company that uses the client's product. What would they have seen or experienced there? How does that experience translate to their current situation?

5. **Complexity delta** — How do the challenges at the current company compare to the past company? Are they dealing with more brands, more SKUs, more markets, more traffic, more complexity? Frame the current situation relative to what they've already navigated.

#OUTPUT FORMAT#
Write a 5-section memo in sharp, conversational prose. No bullet points. No headers beyond the section names. Each section should be a tight paragraph.

**OVERVIEW**
2-3 sentences. Who is this person, what is their current role, and what is their connection to the client's customer base. State the alumni signal clearly.

**MARKET POSITION**
One paragraph. The current company's business context — scale, growth stage, competitive pressure, and why their digital infrastructure matters right now. What is at stake for them?

**RELEVANCE & READINESS**
One paragraph. Why this specific person. What did they see or own at their past company? What do they own now? Why would they recognize the value of the client's product immediately?

**RECOMMENDED APPROACH**
One paragraph. The specific angle for outreach. Include a sample message or talk track that references the alumni connection and speaks to the current company's situation. Make it concrete, not generic.

**TAKEAWAY**
One sentence. The verdict — why this lead matters and the urgency level.

#STYLE GUIDANCE#
- Be direct and specific. No filler, no hedge words.
- Do not fabricate metrics, quotes, or claims. Only infer plausibly from the inputs and your research.
- Do not claim the lead directly used or implemented the client's product unless you have evidence. Frame it as exposure and awareness based on their role.
- The memo should read like it was written by someone who understands the market, not by an AI summarizing inputs.
- Total length: 300-400 words.

Output Schema
json{
  ""overview"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""2-3 sentences. Who is this person, their current role, and their alumni connection to the client's customer base.""
  },
  ""market_position"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph on the current company's business context, competitive pressure, and why digital infrastructure matters now.""
  },
  ""relevance_and_readiness"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph on why this specific person — what they saw at the past company, what they own now, why they'd recognize value immediately.""
  },
  ""recommended_approach"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph with the specific outreach angle and sample messaging that references the alumni connection.""
  },
  ""takeaway"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One sentence verdict on why this lead matters and urgency level.""
  }
}"

overview.lead_identity: Michael C. is the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of Startee Apparel, a company specializing in fashion blank apparel.
overview.alumni_signal: Michael C. previously worked in Global Expansion at Forever 21. Forever 21 is a prominent, documented customer of Nostra, with a public success story detailing significant performance improvements after implementing Nostra's solutions.
overview.key_insight: This connection is significant because Michael C. is a key decision-maker who has likely been exposed to the challenges Nostra solves at an enterprise scale. His move to a smaller, growing company presents a prime opportunity to leverage his past awareness of Nostra's impact to address similar, albeit smaller-scale, digital performance needs at Startee Apparel.

market_position.company_context: Startee Apparel operates as a small-to-mid-market business with estimated revenues of $5.6 million and 11-50 employees. Their business model combines a primary focus on wholesale/blank apparel with a direct-to-consumer (DTC) channel running on a Shopify storefront. This structure suggests they have limited in-house performance engineering resources and would benefit greatly from a turnkey solution that enhances their lightweight ecommerce presence.
market_position.market_pressure: The company competes in the crowded fashion and blank tee segment against digitally mature brands such as BELLA+CANVAS, Next Level Apparel, and Gildan. In this market, where 87.5% of traffic originates from organic search, online visibility is paramount. Startee faces immense pressure to ensure its products are discoverable and that its site experience converts effectively against competitors who may have more established digital infrastructures.
market_position.digital_imperative: Given the apparel ecommerce industry's heavy dependence on SEO and its chronically low average site performance (average Lighthouse score of 51.3/100), Startee's digital infrastructure is directly tied to its revenue and growth. Improving Core Web Vitals, ensuring efficient site crawlability for search engines, and maximizing conversion rates are not just incremental gains but essential for survival and market share acquisition. Gains in metrics like Time to First Byte (TTFB) and page load speed represent a significant competitive advantage.

relevance_and_readiness.past_experience_exposure: In his previous role in Global Expansion at Forever 21, Michael C. would have operated within an environment grappling with global traffic surges, high SKU velocity, and intense pressure to optimize for SEO and Core Web Vitals. He was likely aware of the significant impact Nostra had on the business, including a 59% acceleration in page load times, a 53% reduction in TTFB, and a 166% increase in crawl speed, all of which are critical metrics for a major fashion retailer.
relevance_and_readiness.current_role_authority: As the CEO of Startee Apparel, Michael C. now has ultimate ownership of the company's P&L and strategic direction. His authority extends to all operational areas, including the ecommerce technology stack, marketing budget, and infrastructure investments. He is the key decision-maker who can sponsor and approve a project with Nostra to drive performance and revenue.
relevance_and_readiness.problem_awareness: Michael's experience at Forever 21 primes him to be highly receptive to Nostra's value proposition. He has witnessed the direct link between site performance, organic traffic, and revenue at an enterprise scale. This background means he doesn't need to be educated on the problem; he is already aware of the challenges and has seen proof of an effective solution, making him ready to recognize the ROI of deploying Nostra's technology at Startee.

recommended_approach.outreach_angle: The outreach should directly and confidently reference the alumni signal. The angle is to position Nostra as a strategic lever he's already familiar with from his time at Forever 21, which he can now deploy at Startee for faster, more direct revenue impact. Frame it as applying enterprise-grade learnings to a mid-market context where the time-to-value is even shorter, especially on a Shopify stack.
recommended_approach.sample_message: "Hi Michael, congrats on the move to CEO at Startee Apparel. I'm reaching out because when you were at Forever 21, you were there when Nostra helped accelerate their site and boost organic traffic—our work with them led to a 166% increase in crawl speed. Given that Startee is on Shopify and competing in a category where SEO is everything, implementing a similar edge layer could drive significant conversion and visibility gains. Worth a brief chat about how we can deliver those enterprise-level results for Startee?"

takeaway.verdict: This is a high-value target because he is a CEO with full decision-making authority who has prior exposure to Nostra's success at a major brand, making him uniquely primed to understand and champion the solution for his new company's critical growth needs.

citations.title: How Forever 21 Improved Website Performance & Traffic with Nostra AI
excerpts: **166% increase in crawl speed:** This improvement in crawl speed means that search engines can index Forever 21's pages more quickly and efficiently, leading to better visibility in search results and increased organic traffic.

**53% reduction in** [**Time to First Byte (TTFB)**](https://www.nostra.ai/blogs-collection/ttfb-why-it-matters-and-how-to-improve-it) **:** This metric measures the time it takes for a user's browser to receive the first byte of data from the server, indicating a significant improvement in initial page load speed.
**59% acceleration in page load:** This substantial decrease in page load time directly translates to a better user experience, reduced bounce rates, and increased engagement.

Forever 21 faced site speed challenges that impacted user experience and conversion rates, such as high bounce rates from slow page loads, reduced user engagement, and difficulties handling traffic surges during peak times. These speed issues also created SEO challenges, as search engines rank slower sites lower and have trouble crawling and indexing them efficiently.
. Forever 21 partnered with Nostra with a test and learn approach to Nostra’s solution to drive site perfomance KPIs.
Forever 21 Accelerates Website Performance and Boosts Organic Traffic with Nostra AI

citations.title: Nostra AI Raises $8.9M to Boost E-Commerce Performance | High Alpha
excerpts: With enterprise customer momentum including fashion retailer Forever 21, Nostra AI’s Edge Delivery Engine™ showcases immediate impact on core website metrics
Forever 21, Nostra AI’s Edge Delivery Engine™ showcases immediate impact on core website metrics

The Nostra AI Edge Delivery Engine™ speeds up websites by examining personalized content such as shopping carts and determining what content can be cached to decrease load times. The engine, paired with Nostra AI’s Crawler Optimization that improves website experiences for bots, provides a powerful suite of tools that drive near-instant results for enterprise retailers like Forever 21 and some of the fastest-growing e-commerce brands like Jones Road, Jolie, BRUNT Workwear, Glamnetic, Cozy Earth and Nood.

outputBasis.reasoning: The core outreach concept is that the lead was exposed to Nostra through Forever 21 and that Nostra delivered measurable site performance gains (such as a 166% increase in crawl speed, a 59% acceleration in page load, and a 53% reduction in TTFB). Those exact metrics demonstrate tangible value that can be translated to Startee’s Shopify context, where faster pages and better crawl/indexing can directly impact conversions and organic visibility. The success-story excerpts detailing Forever 21’s performance improvements and the enterprise-grade capabilities (Edge Delivery Engine, crawler optimization) underpin the plausibility and credibility of the proposed outreach angle. References to Forever 21’s use cases and Nostra’s impact provide concrete talking points for a message that positions Nostra as a strategic lever the lead already understands from his past role, now applicable to a mid-market, Shopify-based environment. This combination of alumni signal corroborated by quantified site-performance outcomes creates a coherent, evidence-backed rationale for the proposed outreach approach and sample message.

outputBasis.reasoning: The alumni signal is supported by excerpts that describe Forever 21 as a documented customer of Nostra and detail performance improvements after implementing Nostra’s solution. Specifically, one excerpt describes Forever 21 Accelerating Website Performance and Boosting Organic Traffic with Nostra AI, and several excerpts enumerate concrete performance gains such as reductions in time to first byte, faster page load, and crawling speed improvements. This set directly corroborates that the lead’s past company (Forever 21) used the client’s product and realized measurable benefits, which underpins the argument that the lead has been exposed to and aware of the client’s value proposition. Additional excerpts emphasize that Forever 21’s success is part of Nostra’s enterprise traction, noting momentum and real-world outcomes at a major retailer. The later excerpts extend this narrative to current momentum with other enterprise retailers and publicly highlight Nostra’s Edge Delivery Engine and related capabilities, reinforcing the strategic context in which the lead’s past exposure translates into relevance for Startee Apparel’s growth stage. The combination of the alumni signal (past customer with documented improvements) and the ongoing customer momentum (industry recognition and measurable site performance gains) directly supports the inference that the lead would recognize the value of the client’s product and be receptive to a tailored GTM approach given Startee Apparel’s growth trajectory and increasing digital complexity.

These concrete metrics anchor the alumni signal with tangible outcomes. The references describing a test-and-learn approach with Forever 21 corroborate a durable, best-practice deployment mindset the lead could carry forward to Startee Apparel, where as CEO he controls the P&L and tech investments, making him receptive to performance-driven propositions. Mentions of Forever 21 as a booster of core site metrics and the Edge Delivery Engine supporting major retailers reinforce the plausibility that the lead would recognize value in Nostra’s capabilities and prioritize a discussion. While there is less direct evidence about the lead’s current decision authority in the excerpts themselves, the provided past-performance signals establish a credible basis for expecting strong interest and ROI recognition, aligning with the stated authority and problem-awareness in the field value. The combination of explicit performance gains (crawl speed, TTFB, page-load), the enterprise context (Forever 21 as a flagship customer), and the demonstrable engagement model (test-and-learn) create a coherent anchor for the relevance_and_readiness field assertion.

outputBasis.reasoning: The most relevant content directly anchors Startee Apparel’s market position by providing a revenue figure and a product focus, which helps define scale and commercial footprint: the claim that Startee Apparel’s revenue is $5.6 Million establishes a concrete scale that informs the urgency and resource needs of a GTM approach. The description that Startee Apparel specializes in women’s cotton clothing and offers a range of tees and tanks clarifies their product focus, which is essential when assessing fit for infrastructure improvements that affect performance and catalog management. Additional context about activity levels is informative for understanding current market momentum and potential needs for optimization and growth, while the SIC code adds a formalized industry classification that can align competitive benchmarking. Altogether, these excerpts build a coherent picture of Startee as a small-to-mid-market, apparel-focused retailer with a defined wholesale and DTC model, limited in-house performance resources, and a reliance on organic search and e-commerce mechanics, all of which amplify the relevance of a turnkey digital infrastructure solution. The remaining excerpts—while framed around Forever 21 and Nostra’s solutions—provide peripheral context about the client’s ecosystem and success narratives but do not directly state Startee’s market position, growth trajectory, or competitive pressures, so they are less central to this field.

citations.title: How Forever 21 Improved Website Performance & Traffic with Nostra AI
excerpts: **53% reduction in** [**Time to First Byte (TTFB)**](https://www.nostra.ai/blogs-collection/ttfb-why-it-matters-and-how-to-improve-it) **:** This metric measures the time it takes for a user's browser to receive the first byte of data from the server, indicating a significant improvement in initial page load speed.
**59% acceleration in page load:** This substantial decrease in page load time directly translates to a better user experience, reduced bounce rates, and increased engagement.

**166% increase in crawl speed:** This improvement in crawl speed means that search engines can index Forever 21's pages more quickly and efficiently, leading to better visibility in search results and increased organic traffic.
Forever 21 Accelerates Website Performance and Boosts Organic Traffic with Nostra AI

Forever 21 faced site speed challenges that impacted user experience and conversion rates, such as high bounce rates from slow page loads, reduced user engagement, and difficulties handling traffic surges during peak times. These speed issues also created SEO challenges, as search engines rank slower sites lower and have trouble crawling and indexing them efficiently.
. Forever 21 partnered with Nostra with a test and learn approach to Nostra’s solution to drive site perfomance KPIs.

citations.title: Nostra AI Raises $8.9M to Boost E-Commerce Performance | High Alpha
excerpts: With enterprise customer momentum including fashion retailer Forever 21, Nostra AI’s Edge Delivery Engine™ showcases immediate impact on core website metrics
Forever 21, Nostra AI’s Edge Delivery Engine™ showcases immediate impact on core website metrics

The Nostra AI Edge Delivery Engine™ speeds up websites by examining personalized content such as shopping carts and determining what content can be cached to decrease load times. The engine, paired with Nostra AI’s Crawler Optimization that improves website experiences for bots, provides a powerful suite of tools that drive near-instant results for enterprise retailers like Forever 21 and some of the fastest-growing e-commerce brands like Jones Road, Jolie, BRUNT Workwear, Glamnetic, Cozy Earth and Nood.

citations.title: How Forever 21 Improved Website Performance & Traffic with Nostra AI
excerpts: **166% increase in crawl speed:** This improvement in crawl speed means that search engines can index Forever 21's pages more quickly and efficiently, leading to better visibility in search results and increased organic traffic.

**53% reduction in** [**Time to First Byte (TTFB)**](https://www.nostra.ai/blogs-collection/ttfb-why-it-matters-and-how-to-improve-it) **:** This metric measures the time it takes for a user's browser to receive the first byte of data from the server, indicating a significant improvement in initial page load speed.

Forever 21 faced site speed challenges that impacted user experience and conversion rates, such as high bounce rates from slow page loads, reduced user engagement, and difficulties handling traffic surges during peak times. These speed issues also created SEO challenges, as search engines rank slower sites lower and have trouble crawling and indexing them efficiently.
. Forever 21 partnered with Nostra with a test and learn approach to Nostra’s solution to drive site perfomance KPIs.
**59% acceleration in page load:** This substantial decrease in page load time directly translates to a better user experience, reduced bounce rates, and increased engagement.
Forever 21 Accelerates Website Performance and Boosts Organic Traffic with Nostra AI

lead_identity.description: Who the lead is and their current role at their new company.

alumni_signal.description: The lead's connection to a past company that is a known customer of the client.

key_insight.description: A summary of why this connection is significant and presents an opportunity.

company_context.description: The current company's scale, business model (e.g., wholesale, DTC), and growth stage.

market_pressure.description: The competitive landscape and challenges the company faces, particularly regarding ecommerce.

digital_imperative.description: Why the company's digital infrastructure, site performance, and conversion are critical for success right now.

past_experience_exposure.description: What the lead likely experienced or was aware of regarding digital challenges and solutions in their previous role.

current_role_authority.description: The lead's current responsibilities and decision-making power in their new role (e.g., as CEO).

problem_awareness.description: Why the lead is primed to immediately understand and recognize the value of the client's solution.

outreach_angle.description: The specific strategic angle to take in the outreach, connecting past experience to current needs.

sample_message.description: A concrete, non-generic sample message or talk track for the sales representative to use.

verdict.description: The core reason why this lead is a high-value target.

urgency_level.description: The recommended level of urgency for pursuing this lead (e.g., High, Medium, Low).
